offer: For property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual categorization causes delays in financial reporting. We automate the extraction and categorization of utility bills instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual categorization of utility bills is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for exceptions and summaries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing utility data
